propositions: Freeze two versioned ground-truth corpora (outcome corpus, one row per reviewed ticket; finding-adjudication corpus) under the plan-review-gate runs directory with a documented README schema and exact regeneration commands, changing no source code under src/.

Commit the SOTA §5 provenance report and re-verify each of its headline figures against the frozen outcome corpus, recording per figure whether the derived value AGREES or is CORRECTED-TO a new value.

Derive outcome-corpus counts (reopen_count, force_close, completion_verifier_fail_count, review_round_count) and the post_claim_edit_class via exact event predicates, reopen-safe post-claim window, and first-match precedence rules.

Build the adjudication corpus by bucketing findings positionally via coverage.counts (surfaced vs dropped) rather than by the ambiguous decision field, stratified by criterion, meeting a ≥280 surfaced + ≥90 dropped floor.

Double-label a stratified ≥50-finding subset with two independent LLM raters (separate rubrics and models, Rater B blind) and compute Cohen's kappa on binary TP/FP labels, excluding ambiguous pairwise.
Apply a validity gate: kappa ≥ 0.7 makes labels usable ground truth, otherwise kappa.py exits non-zero and the labels are declared unusable for downstream stories.
